items.label: Provider Holdout
items.objective: Collect at least one provider-backed output-eval holdout run with model, timing, and token metadata.
execution_runbook: Set one provider API key in the operator shell, such as OPENAI_API_KEY or DEEPSEEK_API_KEY; never commit or print the value.
For OpenAI Responses: python3 scripts/yao.py output-exec --provider-runner openai --provider-model ${YAO_OUTPUT_EVAL_MODEL:-gpt-4.1-mini} --timeout-seconds 60

For DeepSeek Chat Completions: python3 scripts/yao.py output-exec --provider-runner deepseek --provider-model deepseek-v4-flash --provider-api-format chat-completions --provider-thinking disabled --api-key-env DEEPSEEK_API_KEY --timeout-seconds 120
Copy evidence/world_class/templates/provider-holdout.intake.json to evidence/world_class/submissions/provider-holdout.json and fill only real evidence fields.
items.blocking_reason: No evidence packet has been submitted for review.

success_checks: reports/skill_os2_audit.json item provider-holdout status becomes pass
privacy_contract: Do not commit provider credentials or environment dumps.
The output execution report records output hashes and aggregate run metadata, not raw provider prompts.

source_checklist.label: Provider model run
source_checklist.next_action: Run provider-backed output-exec with real credentials.

source_checklist.label: Timing observed
source_checklist.next_action: Provider execution should record timing metadata.

source_checklist.label: Token usage observed
source_checklist.next_action: Provider execution should return non-estimated token usage.

repair_checklist.next_action: Set one provider API key in the operator shell, such as OPENAI_API_KEY or DEEPSEEK_API_KEY; never commit or print the value.
repair_checklist.verification_command: python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-preflight . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions

phase_queue.label: Unblock access
phase_queue.next_action: Set one provider API key in the operator shell, such as OPENAI_API_KEY or DEEPSEEK_API_KEY; never commit or print the value.

rows.verification_command: python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-preflight . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions

items.label: Human Adjudication
items.objective: Record real blind A/B reviewer decisions before claiming human output review completion.
execution_runbook: Open reports/output_review_kit.md and choose A or B for each pair without opening the answer key.
Record reviewer choices in a separate JSON, JSONL, or CSV decision source with reviewer, reviewed_at, case_id, winner_variant, confidence, required reason, and truthful reviewer_attestation only.
Copy evidence/world_class/templates/human-adjudication.intake.json to evidence/world_class/submissions/human-adjudication.json and fill only real evidence fields.
items.blocking_reason: No evidence packet has been submitted for review.

provenance_requirements: answer key unopened until decisions exist
success_checks: reports/output_review_adjudication.json review_integrity.blind_pack_sha256 exists and matches reports/output_review_decisions.json
reports/output_review_adjudication.json pairs and reviewer_checklist store prompt_sha256, not raw prompt text
reports/skill_os2_audit.json item human-adjudication status becomes pass
privacy_contract: Reviewer decisions should not include raw user data or private customer detail.
Reviewer reasons must be rubric-based and must not include raw user data or private customer detail.
The decision importer rejects raw prompt, output, transcript, message, and answer-key fields.
The adjudication evidence stores prompt_sha256 instead of raw prompt text.
The decision and adjudication artifacts preserve blind_pack_sha256 so reviewers can audit exactly which pack was judged.
Keep the answer key separate until after decisions are recorded.

source_checklist.label: Review pairs exist
source_checklist.next_action: Generate the blind A/B review pack.

source_checklist.label: No pending decisions
source_checklist.next_action: Record a reviewer choice and reason for every pair.

source_checklist.label: Judgments complete
source_checklist.next_action: Every pair needs one valid human judgment.

source_checklist.label: Reviewer metadata
source_checklist.next_action: Record reviewer and reviewed_at before adjudication can count.

source_checklist.label: Reason required
source_checklist.next_action: Keep reason mandatory for every imported or direct reviewer decision.

source_checklist.label: Blind review attested
source_checklist.next_action: Set reviewer_attestation only after choices are completed before opening the answer key.

source_checklist.label: Raw content attested
source_checklist.next_action: Attest that reviewer decisions exclude raw prompts, outputs, transcripts, messages, and private user content.

source_checklist.label: Raw content blocked
source_checklist.next_action: Adjudication evidence should store prompt hashes and reviewer metadata, not raw prompts, outputs, transcripts, or messages.

source_checklist.label: Human evidence ready
source_checklist.next_action: Complete all reviewer decisions with metadata and rationale, plus blind-review attestation and integrity fingerprints.

next_source_actions: Record a reviewer choice and reason for every pair.
Every pair needs one valid human judgment.
Record reviewer and reviewed_at before adjudication can count.
Set reviewer_attestation only after choices are completed before opening the answer key.
Complete all reviewer decisions with metadata and rationale, plus blind-review attestation and integrity fingerprints.

items.label: Native Permission Enforcement
items.objective: Prove at least one real target client or external installer runtime guard enforces approved high-permission capabilities.
execution_runbook: Implement or connect a real target client or external installer runtime guard that blocks undeclared network, file_write, or subprocess capabilities.
Update the generated target adapter only when the guard is actually enforced by that target.
python3 scripts/yao.py package . --platform openai --platform claude --platform generic --platform vscode --output-dir dist --zip
Copy evidence/world_class/templates/native-permission-enforcement.intake.json to evidence/world_class/submissions/native-permission-enforcement.json and fill only real evidence fields.
items.blocking_reason: No evidence packet has been submitted for review.

provenance_requirements: real target client or external installer runtime guard
native enforcement flag or externally accepted guard proof
residual risk retained for fallback targets
success_checks: reports/runtime_permission_probes.json summary.installer_enforcement_pass_count records local installer enforcement but does not replace native evidence
reports/skill_os2_audit.json item native-permission-enforcement status becomes pass
privacy_contract: Do not mark native_enforcement true for metadata-only fallbacks.
Keep residual risks visible for targets that still rely on operator enforcement.

source_checklist.label: Native enforcement
source_checklist.next_action: Collect real target-client or external runtime guard proof.

source_checklist.label: Probe failures
source_checklist.next_action: Runtime permission probes must stay clean.

source_checklist.label: Installer support
source_checklist.next_action: Installer enforcement is supporting evidence, not native proof.

items.label: Native Client Telemetry

execution_runbook: Install the generated native messaging manifest for the real client and send at least one accepted skill_activation or skill_output event.
Copy evidence/world_class/templates/native-client-telemetry.intake.json to evidence/world_class/submissions/native-client-telemetry.json and fill only real evidence fields.
items.blocking_reason: No evidence packet has been submitted for review.

success_checks: reports/skill_os2_audit.json item native-client-telemetry status becomes pass
privacy_contract: Telemetry must remain metadata-only and local-first.
Do not package reports/telemetry_events.jsonl or any raw prompt, output, transcript, note, or message field.

coordination_plan.user_action: Confirm provider access, reviewer availability, target client path, and telemetry client path before collection starts.
coordination_plan.assistant_action: Run preflight and prepare submission drafts without accepting them as evidence.
coordination_plan.external_dependency: User-selected provider, reviewer, and real client surfaces.
coordination_plan.command: python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-preflight . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions && python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-submission-kit . --output-dir evidence/world_class/submissions --prefill-artifacts
coordination_plan.pass_condition: Preflight lists the same pending evidence keys and no credential values are printed.
coordination_plan.privacy_boundary: Drafts and preflight are planning artifacts only; they do not count as evidence.

coordination_plan.user_action: Provide the selected provider API key through an environment variable and confirm the provider, model, endpoint, and API format to use.
coordination_plan.assistant_action: Run provider-backed output execution, verify aggregate timing and token metadata, then prepare the evidence packet.
coordination_plan.external_dependency: Valid provider credentials and a live provider endpoint.
coordination_plan.privacy_boundary: Commit aggregate metadata only; do not commit API keys, raw prompts, raw outputs, or provider request payloads.

coordination_plan.user_action: Open the blind review kit, choose winners for all pairs, add reviewer metadata and reasons, and keep the answer key hidden until decisions are saved.
coordination_plan.assistant_action: Generate the review kit, import decisions, validate integrity, and prepare the human evidence packet.
coordination_plan.external_dependency: A real human reviewer who can make blind A/B judgments.
coordination_plan.command: python3 scripts/yao.py output-review-kit . && python3 scripts/yao.py output-review .
coordination_plan.pass_condition: reports/output_review_adjudication.json has pending_count == 0 and ready_for_human_evidence == true.
coordination_plan.privacy_boundary: Store reviewer choices, reasons, hashes, and attestations; do not store raw prompts or answer-key exposure before decisions.

coordination_plan.owner: target client or installer integrator + assistant
coordination_plan.user_action: Select a real target client or external installer guard that can enforce declared capabilities instead of metadata-only fallback.
coordination_plan.assistant_action: Run runtime permission probes, package verification, install simulation, and prepare the native enforcement evidence packet.
coordination_plan.external_dependency: A real target runtime, extension, client, or installer guard that can block undeclared capabilities.
coordination_plan.privacy_boundary: Do not mark metadata fallback as native enforcement; keep residual risks visible for fallback targets.

coordination_plan.user_action: Install the native host manifest in a real Browser, Chrome, IDE, or provider client and trigger a metadata-only event.
coordination_plan.assistant_action: Generate native host assets, import the external event JSONL, refresh adoption drift, and prepare the telemetry evidence packet.
coordination_plan.external_dependency: A real client process that emits metadata-only telemetry through the native host.
coordination_plan.privacy_boundary: Telemetry must remain metadata-only; do not store raw prompts, outputs, transcripts, notes, or messages.

coordination_plan.user_action: Approve only validated evidence packets and confirm the release wording after the claim guard passes.
coordination_plan.assistant_action: Run intake, submission review, ledger, claim guard, benchmark, evidence consistency, Review Studio, and CI before final publish.
coordination_plan.external_dependency: Accepted evidence packets for every pending world-class key.
coordination_plan.command: python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-intake . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions && python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-submission-review . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions && python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-ledger . --submissions-dir evidence/world_class/submissions && python3 scripts/yao.py world-class-claim-guard . && make ci-test
coordination_plan.pass_condition: Ledger ready_to_claim_world_class, benchmark public_claim_ready, claim guard violation_count == 0, Review Studio has no blockers, and CI passes.
coordination_plan.privacy_boundary: Release evidence may include aggregate reports and hashes only; raw content and credentials remain out of git.

release_gate.final_manual_check: Run make ci-test in a clean worktree and verify GitHub Actions before converting the PR out of Draft.
